applicationNote: Apply through the myNSFAS portal at www.nsfas.org.za before the national closing date.

additionalFunding.name: UKZN Vice-Chancellor's Award
additionalFunding.criteria: Top matric results; strong academic and leadership profile

additionalFunding.name: UKZN Academic Merit Award
additionalFunding.criteria: APS 32+; demonstrated academic excellence per faculty

additionalFunding.name: UKZN Sport Bursary
additionalFunding.criteria: Provincial or national representative in recognised sports code

additionalFunding.name: UKZN Foundation Bursary
additionalFunding.criteria: Disadvantaged students with financial need; South African citizens
